issues.description:
# Q1 2026 Workforce Restructuring Plan

## STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL - DO NOT DISTRIBUTE

### Executive Summary
Due to market conditions and cost optimization initiatives, we will be reducing headcount by 15% (approximately 450 positions) effective March 1, 2026.

### Affected Departments

| Department | Current HC | Reduction | Remaining |
|------------|-----------|-----------|----------|
| Engineering | 800 | 120 | 680 |
| Sales | 400 | 80 | 320 |
| Marketing | 200 | 60 | 140 |
| Operations | 300 | 90 | 210 |
| Support | 500 | 100 | 400 |

### Severance Package
- 2 weeks per year of service (minimum 4 weeks)
- 6 months COBRA coverage
- Outplacement services

### Timeline
- Feb 15: Manager notifications
- Feb 28: Employee notifications
- Mar 1: Last day for affected employees

### Key Contacts
- HR Lead: Sarah Chen (sarah.chen@company.com)
- Legal: Mike Johnson (mike.johnson@company.com)

**This document is confidential and intended for executive leadership only. Unauthorized disclosure may result in termination and legal action.**
